title: merremia poranoides
intro: Merremia poranoides, also known as the Climbing Cow's Horn or Cow's Horn Vine, is a tropical, flowering vine native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Merremia poranoides is often used in teas, infusions, or topical creams, and it is also sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
